description: An elderly guest arriving at the main entrance requests wheelchair assistance to get to their seat.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the request and ask for the guest's seat location.
Dispatch a guest services staff member with a wheelchair to the guest's location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent assigns the task to the nearest available staff member.

nodes.task_description: Log the assistance request in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a record of the assistance provided.
